mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info (user_id, shop_id, pet_type_id, pet_info, foster_days, total_amount, order_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{shopId}, #{petTypeId}, #{petInfo}, #{fosterDays}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, s.shop_name, p.type_name FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN shop s ON o.shop_id = s.id LEFT JOIN pet_type p ON o.pet_type_id = p.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
